baseline_context.read: A TileLang sparse backward branch is only retained if it improves end-to-end TFLOPs cleanly, not just isolated compressed-dKV microbench latency.

branches.name: tilelang_atomic_dkv
branches.contract: No-HSK source-boundary TileLang backward consumes q, kv, dO, indices, valid, lse, delta, and attn_sink; computes dQ, dAttnSink, and raw global-atomic full dKV.

e2e_4x.failure: Step 3 failed with GPU memory access fault during MORI routed VJP reorder.

branches.decision: Correct small-shape source boundary, but raw global atomics do not improve end-to-end TFLOPs and the run is not stable.

branches.name: tilelang_source_hsk_dkv
branches.contract: TileLang recomputes probability/scaled-dP/dQ and feeds selected-limit dKV from BF16 HSK tensors; this reduces the late PyTorch dKV bridge but still creates an HSK global slab.

durability_rerun.failure: Step 3 OOM in MORI local padded VJP dw1 bmm after memory climb.

branches.decision: This branch proved a possible e2e uplift path but is not retained because it is non-clean and non-durable; it also still pays the HSK materialization bridge.

branches.name: tilelang_source_direct_dkv
branches.contract: No-HSK route-owned selected-limit reducer recomputes probability and scaled-dP from source tensors, then reduces by compressed group before global dKV writes.
branches.decision: This branch removes HSK and reduces dKV writes, but making compressed group own full-D contribution production destroys query-major q/dO reuse. Do not run e2e.

retained_next_kernel_contract.name: query_major_nohsk_compact_reducer
retained_next_kernel_contract.producer: Keep query-major MFMA contribution production from q, dO, kv, indices, lse, delta, and attn_sink.
retained_next_kernel_contract.reduction: Perform lane/warp/block grouped or segmented reduction inside the producer before global memory.
retained_next_kernel_contract.writeback: Emit compact reduced partial rows or reduced atomics keyed by compressed_group and D block; avoid raw selected KxD HSK slabs.
rejected_patterns: detached raw ScatterAdd after a global partial slab
raw global atomics per selected row
retained_next_kernel_contract.reason: Prepacking routes is cheap, but group-owned contribution production reloads/recomputes q and dO too often. The useful fusion boundary is query-major math plus group-aware writeback, not group-major math.

decision: No new retained TFLOPs candidate yet. Continue with query-major no-HSK compact reducer and require a clean 4x S4096 throughput A/B before promotion.
